channel.title: GitHub Kotlin Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Kotlin in GitHub

item.title: pppscn/SmsForwarder
item.description: 短信转发器——监控Android手机短信、来电、APP通知，并根据指定规则转发到其他手机：钉钉群自定义机器人、钉钉企业内机器人、企业微信群机器人、飞书机器人、企业微信应用消息、邮箱、bark、webhook、Telegram机器人、Server酱、PushPlus、手机短信等。包括主动控制服务端与客户端，让你轻松远程发短信、查短信、查通话、查话簿、查电量等。（V3.0 新增）PS.这个APK主要是学习与自用，如有BUG请提ISSUE，同时欢迎大家提PR指正

item.title: square/okhttp
item.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for the JVM, Android, and GraalVM.

item.title: duckduckgo/Android
item.description: DuckDuckGo Android App

item.title: stripe/stripe-android
item.description: Stripe Android SDK

item.title: gedoor/legado
item.description: Legado 3.0 Book Reader with powerful controls & full functions❤️阅读3.0, 阅读是一款可以自定义来源阅读网络内容的工具，为广大网络文学爱好者提供一种方便、快捷舒适的试读体验。

item.title: bmax121/APatch
item.description: The patching of Android kernel and Android system

item.title: deniscerri/ytdlnis
item.description: Android Video/Audio Downloader app using yt-dlp

item.title: JetBrains/compose-multiplatform
item.description: Compose Multiplatform, a modern UI framework for Kotlin that makes building performant and beautiful user interfaces easy and enjoyable.

item.title: MatsuriDayo/NekoBoxForAndroid
item.description: NekoBox for Android / sing-box / universal proxy toolchain for Android

item.title: lizongying/my-tv-0
item.description: 電視網絡視頻播放軟件，可以自定義視頻源

item.title: keiyoushi/extensions-source
item.description: Source code of extensions for Tachiyomi/Mihon and variants.

item.title: element-hq/element-x-android
item.description: Android Matrix messenger application using the Matrix Rust Sdk and Jetpack Compose

item.title: aws/aws-toolkit-jetbrains
item.description: AWS Toolkit for JetBrains - a plugin for interacting with AWS from JetBrains IDEs

item.title: DerGoogler/MMRL
item.description: MMRL is an Android app that helps manage your own modules repository.

item.title: yairm210/Unciv
item.description: Open-source Android/Desktop remake of Civ V

item.title: nextcloud/talk-android
item.description: 📱😀 Video & audio calls through Nextcloud on Android

item.title: wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android
item.description: WordPress for Android

item.title: ethereum-lists/chains
item.description: provides metadata for chains

item.title: ankidroid/Anki-Android
item.description: AnkiDroid: Anki flashcards on Android. Your secret trick to achieve superhuman information retention.

item.title: d4rken-org/sdmaid-se
item.description: SD Maid 2/SE is Android's most thorough cleaning tool.

item.title: gkd-kit/gkd
item.description: 基于无障碍，高级选择器，订阅规则的自定义屏幕点击 Android 应用 | An Android APP with custom screen tapping based on Accessibility, Advanced Selectors, and Subscription Rules
